task: Do a thorough structural survey of the agent harness codebase at the root of this workspace. Focus on: 1) harness/ directory - list all files and read the key ones: __init__.py, loop.py, loop_guards.py, runner.py, config.py, cli.py, safety/ directory, tools/ directory, modes/ directory, lanes.py, trace.py, trace_bridge.py, checkpoint.py, eval/ directory. 2) Read pyproject.toml and README.md for overall project shape. 3) Read conftest.py and any test files in harness/tests/. Return a comprehensive structural summary: what each major module does, key architectural patterns, dependencies, and anything that looks incomplete, unusual, or potentially problematic.

name: list_files
content_preview:
.claude/
.cursor/
.engram/
.env
.git/
.github/
.gitignore
.harness/
.mypy_cache/
.plans/
.playwright-cli/
.pytest_cache/
.ruff_cache/
__pycache__/
AGENTS.md
CLAUDE.md
conftest.py
CONTRIBUTING.md
docs/
